property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] When I'm ready, I will put the Lure to start the fight

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] This time I can't decide when to start fighting. I need to act now.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] If i remember correct, he said that i need to aim totally vertically, so the arrow with flare can reach high enough for the scout's vision.

property.name: text
property.value: You need to aim TOTALLY VERTICALLY.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Okay, need to shot the flare again.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Oh crap, not high enough.

property.name: text
property.value: Your arrow did not reach enough height.

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Oh Shit! The Zeds Arrived

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Trader's Voice:[-] You can't keep inside, go over there! The mission will fail if you insist

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Why there is another horde ?

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Oh shit! I'm still alive

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Cant't activate, there are zombies nearby

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Cant't activate, there are zombies nearby

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I can't drive a vehicle

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I can't drive a vehicle

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I can't drive a vehicle

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I can't drive a vehicle

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I can't drive a vehicle

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I can't drive a vehicle

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I've finished the first wave

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I've finished the second wave

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] I've finished the third wave

property.name: text
property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Cant't activate, The lure needs to be in a open area.

property.value: | [FF6600]Player's Mind:[-] Cant't activate, ZombieLure needs to burn for at least 30secs
